name: dropi-input
source: Figma — Input (126:9), Incremental Input (9539:1664), Code Input (130:546)
description: Text input field with label, helper text, icon support, and validation states. Available in Default and Password types, Normal and Large sizes.
designRules: Always include a Label above the input
Helper text goes below the input — use for hints or error messages
Error state shows red border and error helper text
Focus state shows primary-500 border color
Disabled state reduces opacity and blocks interaction

preIcon.description: Icon inside input left side (e.g. User icon)

postIcon.description: Icon inside input right side (e.g. Eye icon for password)

showTooltip.description: Shows tooltip icon next to label
